DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO POST JUDGMENT INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $340 SHALL BE PAID WITHIN 21 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE CHAN. NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Nrc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-26-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s motion to compel responses to post judgment interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and produce documents within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 shall be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-07-2008 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
